overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a dark, abandoned concrete tunnel filled with derelict vehicles. The character carries a rifle and backpack, moving steadily toward a bright exit at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned concrete tunnel with tool cabinets and debris

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark tunnel, rifle slung on back, scanning the abandoned interior

entered.detail: cinder block wall running along the left side of the tunnel
tall metal locker with multiple compartments and tools
purple spray-painted graffiti on the concrete wall
derelict four-door car with broken windows
industrial metal shelves with scattered items

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit concrete tunnel with cinder block walls. A metal tool cabinet and shelving units line the right side while abandoned vehicles sit scattered along the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel interior with abandoned vehicles and distant exit light

events.description: bright daylight from the tunnel exit becomes visible in the far distance
character briefly turns around to look behind before continuing forward

agents.ego_description: continuing through the tunnel toward the visible exit light, navigating between abandoned cars

entered.detail: bright white light visible at the far end of the tunnel indicating the exit
large olive green military transport truck parked along the left wall
large concrete block used as road barrier

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses deeper into the tunnel, a bright exit light appears in the distance. The path is cluttered with abandoned sedans and a large military truck. The character briefly turns to check behind before continuing toward the light.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel exit transition with bright outdoor light

events.description: approaching the tunnel exit where the scene transitions from dark interior to bright outdoor environment

agents.ego_description: walking toward the tunnel exit, passing the last abandoned vehicles before reaching the bright outdoor light

entered.detail: concrete archway framing the tunnel exit with bright light streaming through
green pine trees visible through the exit opening
bright daylight sky visible through the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the tunnel exit where bright daylight floods in. The concrete archway frames a view of outdoor trees and buildings. The character navigates past the final abandoned vehicles, including the military truck, as the environment transitions from the dark tunnel to the illuminated exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit concrete tunnel that gradually opens into a bright, sunlit exterior. It begins by trailing a character past cinder block walls lined with metal tool cabinets and shelving units, moving through a corridor scattered with abandoned vehicles. As the character progresses deeper, the oppressive darkness gives way to a distant, glowing exit, prompting a brief glance backward before the camera continues past a cluster of sedans and a large military truck. The scene then shifts as the character approaches the tunnel's mouth, where the concrete archway begins to frame a view of outdoor trees and buildings. Finally, the environment transitions fully from the shadows of the tunnel into the flood of brilliant daylight as the character navigates past the last of the derelict vehicles and emerges outside.
